title: Alarm
description: Alarm schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma SD-WAN API

site_id.description: Site where the alarm was generated.

site_name.description: Name of the site where the alarm was generated.

element_id.description: ION element identifier that generated the alarm.

acknowledged.description: Whether the alarm has been acknowledged.

acknowledged_at.description: Timestamp when the alarm was acknowledged.

raised_at.description: Timestamp when the alarm was raised.

cleared_at.description: Timestamp when the alarm was cleared. Null if still active.
